objective: Make benchmark render use the candidate render sandbox, report honest render modes, and bind ranking evidence to candidate-specific candidate and render manifests.

render_dependency_probe.behavior: benchmark payload includes render_dependency_probe; missing tools produce dependency_missing render mode rather than success or requested_not_implemented

rank_basis_counts.candidate_specific_rank_rate: computed as candidate_specific_render_count / ranked_count, with partial-render regression coverage asserting 0.5 for one rendered candidate among two ranked candidates

implemented_behaviors: quality_benchmark.run_benchmark_suite(render=True) invokes candidate_render.render_candidate_set for fixture-local candidate sandbox rendering.
Benchmark render no longer emits requested_not_implemented.
Benchmark results use honest render modes: rendered, dependency_missing, blocked, failed, or not_requested.
Candidate scores are bound to matching candidate_id candidate_manifest.json and render_manifest.json files from build/candidates/<candidate_id>/.
Scores include rank_basis, candidate_manifest_path, render_manifest_path, and candidate_hash evidence fields.
Dependency-missing render manifests produce negative render evidence and no positive rendered_before_after_available evidence.
Unrendered or partially rendered candidates are counted separately in rank_basis_counts and cannot inflate candidate_specific_rank_rate.
Benchmark render tests assert fixture source and exports are not mutated.

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_quality_benchmark.py -k "benchmark_render or requested_not_implemented or candidate_specific_rank_rate"
tests.red_result_before_implementation: failed because benchmark render emitted requested_not_implemented and did not expose candidate-specific render metrics

tests.command: uv run pytest tests/test_quality_benchmark.py -k "benchmark_render or requested_not_implemented or candidate_specific_rank_rate or missing_fixture_uses_blocked_mode or partial_render_basis"
uv run pytest tests/test_quality_benchmark.py tests/test_candidate_render.py tests/test_candidate_rank.py

uv run ruff check tests/test_quality_benchmark.py tests/test_candidate_render.py tests/test_candidate_rank.py scripts/quality/quality_benchmark.py scripts/candidates/candidate_render.py scripts/candidates/candidate_rank.py
uv run python -m py_compile scripts/quality/quality_benchmark.py scripts/candidates/candidate_render.py scripts/candidates/candidate_rank.py

adversarial_verification.summary: Initial review found residual render_mode none paths and incorrect candidate_specific_rank_rate denominator. Both blockers were fixed and locked with regressions. Final review reported no blocking findings.

tooling_notes.summary: Previously unavailable in this environment: uv run basedpyright failed to spawn basedpyright.
rg --files -g 'check-no-excuse-rules.py' returned no matching script in this repository.
